title: Petersburg Hospital Board to meet to discuss letter of support for new hospital project
summary: Petersburg’s Hospital Board will meet tonight at 5:30 p.m. to vote on a letter of support for the construction of the new hospital facility. The letter highlights the importance of the healthcare services Petersburg Medical Center provides to people in the region, as well as its role as an economic engine in Petersburg. It also outlines the need for replacing the old facility, which is rapidly falling out of code. If approved by the hospital board, the letter will be used to advocate for the new facility, especially in matters related to fundraising. At the...
